meaning: n.寄件人,发报机,发话机,发送人(器)
examples: The idea was that a person acting as a 'sender' would attempt to beam the image over to the 'receiver' relaxing in the sealed room.
The sender of the first correct entry drawn will win a weekend for two in Venice.
Two technologies are used in conjunction: DKIM (Domain Keys Identified Mail) and SPF (Sender Permitted From).
So a warrant is required to seize an email as it travels from sender to receiver.
